title: Bluprynt raises $4.25 million seed round from Coinbase Ventures, Robinhood to streamline crypto compliance
message_html: Bluprynt raises $4.25 million seed round from Coinbase Ventures, Robinhood to streamline crypto compliance ...
snippet: Bluprynt secured $4.2 million in a seed funding round led by major industry players, including Coinbase Ventures and Robinhood.
